title: Paintbrush
description: Peacefully paint your world using brushes (and paint guns)
body:
# This mod will no longer be updated on modrinth!
# See https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paintbrush-fabric for the latest version!




![Paintbrush logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4x1BLrza/images/3dd16fb502df4cc8423100a819f959d088e22463.png)

Paint blocks using brushes and paint guns!

- **Two paintbrush types** and a **paint gun**
- 99 different blocks are supported:
  - Planks
  - Stripped Logs
  - Tuff blocks
  - Deepslate blocks
  - Stone blocks
  - Diorite blocks
  - Glass blocks
  - And more!
  
- over 1500 painted block variants
- Server-side through Polymer, so players only need your resource pack—no client installs required.

Currently, **no crafting recipes** are included; items must be accessed via creative mode or commands.

## Info

The mod uses around ~600 of unused noteblock blockstates through polymer.

Automatic resourcepack hosting:
- https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/
